2604.27789.title: Test Before You Deploy: Governing Updates in the LLM Supply Chain
2604.27789.paper_summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly used as core dependencies in software systems. However, the hosted LLM services evolve continuously through provider-side updates without explicit version changes. These silent updates can introduce behavioral drift, causing regressions in functionality, formatting, safety constraints, or other application-specific requirements. Existing approaches focus primarily on regression testing or versioning but do not provide deployer-side mechanisms for governing compatibility during opaque model evolution. This paper proposes a deployment-side governance framework based on three components: clearly defined rules for how the model is allowed to behave (production contracts), focused testing organized by deployment risk categories (risk-category-based testing suite), and release checkpoints that block updates unless they meet defined safety and performance standards (compatibility gates). Through exploratory validation across multiple LLM versions, we provide evidence that targeted testing in specific risk areas can uncover performance regressions that overall metrics miss. We also identify several open research challenges, including how to systematically build effective test suites, how to set reliable performance thresholds in non-deterministic systems, and how to detect and explain model drift when providers offer limited transparency. Overall, we frame LLM update management as a software supply chain governance problem and outline a research agenda for putting deployer-side compatibility controls into practice.
2604.27789.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）越來越多地作為軟體系統的核心依賴。<lb/>然而，託管的LLM服務通過提供者端的更新持續演變，而不進行明確的版本變更。<lb/>這些靜默更新可能會引入行為漂移，導致功能、格式、安全約束或其他應用特定需求的回歸。<lb/>現有的方法主要集中在回歸測試或版本控制上，但並未提供部署端的機制來管理不透明模型演變期間的相容性。<lb/>本文提出了一個基於三個組件的部署端治理框架：明確定義模型允許行為的規則（生產合約）、根據部署風險類別組織的專注測試（基於風險類別的測試套件），以及阻止更新的發布檢查點，除非它們符合定義的安全和性能標準（相容性門）。<lb/>通過對多個LLM版本的探索性驗證，我們提供證據表明，在特定風險領域的針對性測試可以揭示整體指標所忽略的性能回歸。<lb/>我們還確定了幾個開放的研究挑戰，包括如何系統性地構建有效的測試套件、如何在非確定性系統中設置可靠的性能閾值，以及如何在提供者提供有限透明度時檢測和解釋模型漂移。<lb/>總體而言，我們將LLM更新管理框架化為一個軟體供應鏈治理問題，並概述了一個研究議程，以將部署端的相容性控制付諸實踐。
2604.27789.author: Mohd Sameen Chishti et.al.
2604.27789.authors: Mohd Sameen Chishti, Damilare Peter Oyinloye, Jingyue Li
